message:
fix(connector): numeric safety, capacity limits, and operator intelligence enhancements

diagnostic_registry:
- Add MAX_DIAGNOSTICS capacity limit (4096) to prevent unbounded growth
- Guard against NaN/Infinity VOI scores with fail-closed finite check
- Division-by-zero safety: return 0.0 for zero-cost diagnostics instead
  of f64::MAX; guard vpc ratio against non-finite results

vef_perf_budget:
- Fail-closed for non-finite noise_multiplier: zero all budgets so nothing
  passes rather than producing NaN budgets that bypass gates
- Guard individual budget calculations against non-finite results
- Guard CV threshold comparison against non-finite values

vef_policy_constraints:
- Fix mutable borrow pattern: extract entry reference before increment to
  avoid compound assignment on or_insert return value

operator_intelligence:
- Replace bool accepted field with RecommendationDecision enum
  (Pending/Accepted/Rejected) for richer audit trail semantics
- Add audit_entry() lookup helper for recommendation retrieval
- Use hex_encode import for cleaner hash formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
